evals.prompt: I built a no-code analytics tool and want to launch it across as many startup directories as possible for backlinks and early users. Plan my launch.
evals.expected_output: Multi-phase launch plan with sequencing, platform selection, and tracking setup

assertions.name: phased_approach
assertions.description: Recommends phased launch: instant-listing platforms first, editorial queues second, Product Hunt last

assertions.name: platform_list
assertions.description: Covers at least 5 specific directories with backlink strength and cost

assertions.name: timing_strategy
assertions.description: Recommends submitting to free editorial queues on Day 1 while doing instant listings

assertions.name: tracking
assertions.description: Suggests UTM parameters or analytics to measure results per platform

evals.prompt: I have no budget. What free startup directories should I submit to for SEO backlinks?
evals.expected_output: List of free directories sorted by backlink strength with submission strategy

assertions.name: free_only
assertions.description: Only recommends free submission options, no paid placements

assertions.name: sorted_by_strength
assertions.description: Ranks directories by backlink DR/DA from highest to lowest

assertions.name: instant_vs_queue
assertions.description: Distinguishes between instant-listing and editorial-queue platforms

assertions.name: cumulative_value
assertions.description: Explains that backlink value is cumulative across multiple directories

evals.prompt: Which startup directories should I prioritize — there are too many and I don't have time for all of them
evals.expected_output: Prioritized shortlist with rationale, starting with highest-value submissions

assertions.name: prioritized_list
assertions.description: Provides a ranked shortlist of top 5-7 directories to focus on

assertions.name: time_estimate
assertions.description: Notes instant-listing platforms take ~10 minutes each

assertions.name: diminishing_returns
assertions.description: Acknowledges most directories beyond the top 7-10 have diminishing returns

assertions.name: product_relevance
assertions.description: Considers product category fit when prioritizing directories
